v1.0.description:
Brutal Orchestra Archipelago Mod

Archipelago randomizer integration for Brutal Orchestra.

	Installation

	Mod (C# client)
1. Install [BepInEx 5.4](https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx) for Brutal Orchestra.
2. Download `BrutalOrchestraArchipelago.dll` from [Releases](https://github.com/ТВОЙ_НИК/BrutalOrchestraArchipelago/releases).
3. Place the DLL in `BepInEx/plugins/`.
4. Run the game once to generate the config file at `BepInEx/config/brutal.ap.mod.cfg`.
5. Edit the config to set your server URL and slot name.

	APWorld (generator)
1. Download `brutal_orchestra.apworld` from [Releases](https://github.com/ТВОЙ_НИК/BrutalOrchestraArchipelago/releases).
2. Place it in the `custom_worlds` folder of your Archipelago installation.
v1.0.title: v1.0 - Initial Release

v1.1.description:
Fixed problems:
Battles now working 
Now you can revieve Items and Heroes only from server

Added features:
Connect to server from game (no need to change config) (change ws to wss)
Dynamic amount of chests per location
Battle checks separeted between locations and you can change amount of checks
v1.1.title: v1.1 - Fixes and new locations

v1.2.description:
New features:
1) Hardmode include (You need to get Hardmode access check)
2) Item sends by their names, not random anymore

Known issues:
Not EVERY item can be send
v1.2.title: v1.2 - Hardmode update

v1.2.1.description: Now you recieve heroes and money properly
